title: AN ACT FIXING THE COMPENSATION OF MEMÂ­BERS OF THE ELECTION REGISTRATION BOARD, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REÂ­PUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-FIVE HUNÂ­DRED EIGHTY-EIGHT, AS AMENDED, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11239 / 65 OG No. 6, 1233 (February 10, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4855, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT FIXING THE COMPENSATION OF MEMÂBERS OF THE ELECTION REGISTRATION BOARD, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REÂPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-FIVE HUNÂDRED EIGHTY-EIGHT, AS AMENDED, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Republic Act Numbered Thirty-five hundred and eighty-eight, as amended, is hereby further amended by inserting a new section between Section six and seven thereof, to be known as Section six-A which shall read as follows:

"SEC. 6-A.

Compensation.

âEvery member of an ElecÂtion Registration Hoard representing a political party shall be entitled to a compensation of fifteen pesos for each day of actual service in the Board, but shall not be entitled to traveling expenses."

SEC. 2. Until provisions therefor shall have been made in the annual General Appropriations Act, the CommisÂsion on Elections is hereby authorized to use such sums as may be necessary from savings in any appropriation provided for said Commission including excess certifications to accounts payable to carry out the provisions of this Act and for other purposes in connection with the imÂplementation of Republic Act Numbered Thirty-five hunÂdred and eighty-eight, as amended.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, July 18, 1966.
